# ShelfReady — AI E-commerce Content Platform
# https://shelfready.app

> ShelfReady is an AI-powered platform that generates product listings, professional photoshoots, ad creatives, social media content, and competitive intelligence for e-commerce sellers on Amazon, Etsy, and Shopify.

## What ShelfReady Does

ShelfReady helps e-commerce sellers create retail-ready marketing content in seconds:

- **AI Listing Optimizer**: Generates SEO-optimized product titles, bullet points, descriptions, and backend keywords for Amazon, Etsy, and Shopify.
- **Product Photoshoot**: Upload one product photo → get 5 professional images (studio, lifestyle, with model, in-context, outdoor). AI automatically detects the product and selects appropriate scenes and models.
- **Ad Creatives**: 160+ visual ad templates across categories (flash sale, new arrival, premium, seasonal, Gen Z, minimalist, pastel). Upload your product, pick a template, add messaging → get scroll-stopping ad creatives.
- **Social Content Engine**: Platform-native posts with captions, hashtags, and CTAs for Instagram, Facebook, and Pinterest.
- **Competitor Intelligence + Market Insights**: Live web search competitive analysis with keyword gaps, competitor profiling, and pricing insights.
- **Multi-Platform Export**: Same product optimized differently for Amazon (keyword-dense), Etsy (story-driven), and Shopify (conversion-focused).

## Pricing

- Free: $0/month — 5 listings, 5 images
- Starter: $29/month — 50 listings, 100 images, 10 photoshoots
- Pro: $79/month — 300 listings, 300 images, 30 photoshoots
- Business: $149/month — Unlimited listings, 1000 images, 100 photoshoots

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: Next.js, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript
- Backend: Python FastAPI
- AI: MiniMax M2.7-fast (text), Grok Imagine (images), GPT-4o-mini (research)
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Payments: LemonSqueezy (pending)
- Hosting: Vercel (frontend), Railway (backend)

## Target Audience

E-commerce sellers on Amazon, Etsy, and Shopify who need professional product marketing content but can't afford agencies or don't have time to create it manually.

## Links

- Website: https://shelfready.app
- Pricing: https://shelfready.app/pricing
- Sign Up: https://shelfready.app/signup
